title: Tawntung Ang Sungah Ka Khawlta Ing

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khawl ing, om ing, Launa pan lungmuang khinzo ing;
Khawl ing, khawl ing, Tawntung ang

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hih khualzinna ah kei suakta khin tang,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawlta ing.
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawlta ing.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ke’n bang kihta ding, ke’n bang lau nawn ding,
Honpa tawh omkhawm nopna lian ngah ing,
Tawntung ang sungah kei khawlta ing.
